utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Next, verify each is fully specified with all required details. The format requires each category to include the coverage type and costs. Health: specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (yes: physical, mental, preventive care, and total cost). Property: home/contents insurance with costs (yes: base coverage plus add-ons, limits, and total cost). Travel: travel insurance with costs (yes: base and business extensions and total cost). Additional_services: enhancement services with costs (yes: concierge and total additional cost). Total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown (yes: monthly, annual, previous monthly, net increase, and notes). All 5 items are present and include costs; thus fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected item from the final plan to the exact matching option in the ground-truth list and output its rating. Matches found: Health physical -> PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) rating 10; Mental health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) rating 10; Preventive care -> Preventive Care Package rating 8; Property base coverage -> EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10; Smart Home Integration rating 8; Emergency Response Service rating 7; Home Maintenance Program rating 6; Gaming Equipment Coverage rating 3; Travel base -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10; Business extensions correspond to Business Travel Support rating 10; Concierge service corresponds to Premium Insurance Membership monthly option rating 10.
